elements.title: Fanny Cochrane Smith
elements.contents: ... that recordings of the voice of Fanny Cochrane Smith (pictured) were used in the development of a modern Aboriginal Tasmanian constructed language?

elements.title: The Missing
elements.contents: ... that The Missing took three years to write but only four days to film?

elements.title: Chicago State Cougars football
elements.contents: ... that Chicago State Cougars football is the only NCAA Division I gridiron football program in Chicago?

elements.title: 2021 Liechtenstein general election
elements.contents: ... that only 42 votes separated the two major parties in the 2021 Liechtenstein general election?

elements.title: Renegade II
elements.contents: ... that the space-combat simulation game Renegade II was cancelled for poor quality despite the release of demo and beta versions and reviews?

elements.title: Marcel Breuer House II
elements.contents: ... that when finished in 1947, the Marcel Breuer House II was suspended from cables costing US$22?

elements.title: Gabriele Lösekrug-Möller
elements.contents: ... that Gabriele Lösekrug-Möller worked as a bookseller before entering politics?

elements.title: 1927 Salvadoran coup attempt
elements.contents: ... that the 1927 Salvadoran coup attempt failed after one of its leaders was unable to convince the president that he had been overthrown?

elements.title: Mr. Noone Special
elements.contents: ... that Reiji Okii came up with the title of Mr. Noone Special in the shower?
